title: TriviaQA - Reading Comprehension
description: Trivia question answering with evidence passages, based on the TriviaQA dataset (Joshi et al., ACL 2017). Annotators answer trivia questions using provided evidence documents and assess whether the context is sufficient.
citation:

    month = jul,

    address = "Vancouver, Canada",
